headline: American International Group (AIG) to Acquire Everest Colombia Unit
summary: American International Group, Inc. (NYSE:AIG) is one of the 12 Most Undervalued Stocks to Invest In. On May 19, 2026, American International Group, Inc. (NYSE:AIG) entered into a definitive agreement to acquire Everest Compania de Seguros Generales Colombia, Everest Group’s (EG) insurance subsidiary in Colombia. The deal will give AIG subsidiaries 100% of the equity […]
